시편 89:1.content: I will sing of the loving kindness of Yahweh forever. With my mouth, I will make known your faithfulness to all generations.

시편 89:2.content: I indeed declare, “Love stands firm forever. You established the heavens. Your faithfulness is in them.”

시편 89:3.content: “I have made a covenant with my chosen one, I have sworn to David, my servant,

시편 89:4.content: ‘I will establish your offspring forever, and build up your throne to all generations.’ ”

시편 89:5.content: The heavens will praise your wonders, Yahweh, your faithfulness also in the assembly of the holy ones.

시편 89:6.content: For who in the skies can be compared to Yahweh? Who among the sons of the heavenly beings is like Yahweh,

시편 89:7.content: a very awesome God in the council of the holy ones, to be feared above all those who are around him?

시편 89:8.content: Yahweh, God of Armies, who is a mighty one, like you? Yah, your faithfulness is around you.

시편 89:9.content: You rule the pride of the sea. When its waves rise up, you calm them.

시편 89:10.content: You have broken Rahab in pieces, like one of the slain. You have scattered your enemies with your mighty arm.

시편 89:11.content: The heavens are yours. The earth also is yours, the world and its fullness. You have founded them.

시편 89:12.content: You have created the north and the south. Tabor and Hermon rejoice in your name.

시편 89:13.content: You have a mighty arm. Your hand is strong, and your right hand is exalted.

시편 89:14.content: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of your throne. Loving kindness and truth go before your face.

시편 89:15.content: Blessed are the people who learn to acclaim you. They walk in the light of your presence, Yahweh.

시편 89:16.content: In your name they rejoice all day. In your righteousness, they are exalted.

시편 89:17.content: For you are the glory of their strength. In your favor, our horn will be exalted.

시편 89:18.content: For our shield belongs to Yahweh, our king to the Holy One of Israel.

시편 89:19.content: Then you spoke in vision to your saints, and said, “I have given strength to the warrior. I have exalted a young man from the people.

시편 89:20.content: I have found David, my servant. I have anointed him with my holy oil,

시편 89:21.content: with whom my hand shall be established. My arm will also strengthen him.

시편 89:22.content: No enemy will tax him. No wicked man will oppress him.

시편 89:23.content: I will beat down his adversaries before him, and strike those who hate him.

시편 89:24.content: But my faithfulness and my loving kindness will be with him. In my name, his horn will be exalted.

시편 89:25.content: I will set his hand also on the sea, and his right hand on the rivers.

시편 89:26.content: He will call to me, ‘You are my Father, my God, and the rock of my salvation!’

시편 89:27.content: I will also appoint him my firstborn, the highest of the kings of the earth.

시편 89:28.content: I will keep my loving kindness for him forever more. My covenant will stand firm with him.

시편 89:29.content: I will also make his offspring endure forever, and his throne as the days of heaven.

시편 89:30.content: If his children forsake my law, and don’t walk in my ordinances;

시편 89:31.content: if they break my statutes, and don’t keep my commandments;

시편 89:32.content: then I will punish their sin with the rod, and their iniquity with stripes.

시편 89:33.content: But I will not completely take my loving kindness from him, nor allow my faithfulness to fail.

시편 89:34.content: I will not break my covenant, nor alter what my lips have uttered.

시편 89:35.content: Once I have sworn by my holiness, I will not lie to David.

시편 89:36.content: His offspring will endure forever, his throne like the sun before me.

시편 89:37.content: It will be established forever like the moon, the faithful witness in the sky.”

시편 89:38.content: But you have rejected and spurned. You have been angry with your anointed.

시편 89:39.content: You have renounced the covenant of your servant. You have defiled his crown in the dust.

시편 89:40.content: You have broken down all his hedges. You have brought his strongholds to ruin.

시편 89:41.content: All who pass by the way rob him. He has become a reproach to his neighbors.

시편 89:42.content: You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries. You have made all of his enemies rejoice.

시편 89:43.content: Yes, you turn back the edge of his sword, and haven’t supported him in battle.

시편 89:44.content: You have ended his splendor, and thrown his throne down to the ground.

시편 89:45.content: You have shortened the days of his youth. You have covered him with shame.

시편 89:46.content: How long, Yahweh? Will you hide yourself forever? Will your wrath burn like fire?

시편 89:47.content: Remember how short my time is, for what vanity you have created all the children of men!

시편 89:48.content: What man is he who shall live and not see death, who shall deliver his soul from the power of Sheol?

시편 89:49.content: Lord, where are your former loving kindnesses, which you swore to David in your faithfulness?

시편 89:50.content: Remember, Lord, the reproach of your servants, how I bear in my heart the taunts of all the mighty peoples,

시편 89:51.content: With which your enemies have mocked, Yahweh, with which they have mocked the footsteps of your anointed one.

시편 89:52.content: Blessed be Yahweh forever more. Amen, and Amen.
